title: microlaena distichophylla
intro: Microlaena distichophylla, also known as the short grass panic, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Microlaena distichophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Microlaena distichophylla is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried herb to be consumed as a medicinal treatment.
